top_signals.title: Houthis Threaten Targeted Attacks on Shipping Companies Visiting Saudi Ports
top_signals.summary: Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthi militia told shipping companies not to load or discharge cargo at Saudi Arabian ports or they may be targeted, according to an email the group sent to companies.The Houthis on Monday declared a naval blockade against Saudi Arabia…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yen Slides Past 163 Mark to Fresh Four-Decade Low Against Dollar
top_signals.summary: The yen weakened past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986, raising the risk of intervention by authorities to prop up the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says this old-school investing concept still wins — even in the AI boom
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer urged investors to diversify beyond the market's hottest AI winners, warning that no single investment theme should dominate a portfolio.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran Tensions Jostle Markets - WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
